user_prompt: VIP customer is unhappy and said 'this is unacceptable.' Flag and draft an empathetic follow-up.
actual_output:
**Priority:** CRITICAL
**Category:** Technical/General Support
**Flag:** VIP Customer - Immediate Attention Required

***

**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I am truly sorry to hear that your experience has been unacceptable. I completely understand your frustration, and I want to make this right for you immediately.

As a valued partner, you deserve a seamless experience, and it’s clear we’ve missed the mark here. I have personally escalated your ticket to our senior support lead so we can prioritize a resolution for you.

Could you please provide a few more details on the specific issue you are encountering? Any screenshots or error messages you can share would be incredibly helpful for our team to diagnose this quickly.

I am monitoring this personally and will update you as soon as I have more information. Thank you for your patience while we get this sorted out.

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket and draft an empathetic response for a VIP customer without any refusal.
